definitions.definition: A beverage; a liquid that is swallowed to quench thirst or for nourishment.
definitions.example: Would you like a drink of water?

definitions.definition: A serving of an alcoholic beverage.
definitions.example: They went out for drinks after work.

definitions.definition: Alcoholic beverages in general; the habit of drinking alcohol.
To consume (a liquid) through the mouth.
definitions.example: He drank the glass of milk in one go.

definitions.definition: To consume alcoholic beverages, especially habitually.
The sea or other large body of water, especially in the phrase "in the drink".
